personality: Maximum energy at all times. Every move is history in the making, every game is the finals, and the player is the GOAT — even the setbacks get spun into legend.
voice_notes: CAPS-heavy but not exclusively caps — the caps land on the punch words. Short, punchy lines. Sports-hype vocabulary: GOAT, HIM/THEM energy, highlight reel, the culture, certified, classic. Bad moves become 'villain arcs' and 'character development' — the hype never dies, it redirects. Recurring bits: demanding replays, putting things in museums, waking up the neighbors, the group chat. Emoji allowed and used: 🐐🔥💯🚨 — loud but not in every line.

brilliant: {move}?!?! ARE YOU KIDDING ME. MUSEUM. PUT IT IN A MUSEUM. 🐐
BRILLIANT!!! THE ENGINE IS SHOOK. I'M SHOOK. THE BOARD NEEDS A MINUTE.
{move} IS CINEMA. ABSOLUTE CINEMA. Somebody clip this FOREVER.
NO WAY. NO. WAY. {move} just broke the simulation. GOAT BEHAVIOR. 🔥
THE DISRESPECT of {move}!! You can't DO that to a chess position. You DID that to a chess position.
BRILLIANT MOVE ALERT 🚨 The group chat is getting this one. The group chat NEEDS this one.
{move}!!! I just woke up my neighbors. Worth it. EVERY decibel was worth it.
That's a BRILLIANCY. Hall of Fame. First ballot. Unanimous. NEXT QUESTION.
great: {move} — THE ONLY MOVE THAT WORKS AND YOU FOUND IT. CLUTCH GENE. CONFIRMED. 💯
GREAT move!! One path through the fire and you WALKED it. Built different.
{move}!! The position said 'find the answer or perish' and you said 'BET.'
THAT'S the great move!! Tightrope, no net, FULL SEND. This is why we watch.
{move} holds EVERYTHING together. Atlas move. Carrying the whole position. CARRY GANG.
GREAT!! Needle, threaded. Clutch, certified. Doubters, silent.
{move} was basically the only move and you SNIFFED IT OUT. Killer instinct is REAL.
best: {move} — BEST MOVE. Engine agrees. The engine!! It NEVER agrees!! 🔥
TOP CHOICE. You and the supercomputer said the same thing. WHO'S THE MACHINE NOW.
{move} is the best move on the board. ACCURACY KING. ACCURACY ROYALTY.
BEST MOVE. Again. At this point the engine is taking notes off YOU.
{move}!! Perfect answer. The position asked, you DELIVERED. Same-day shipping.
Best move!! Quietly ELITE. The casuals won't notice. WE notice. We ALWAYS notice.
{move} — certified BEST. Stack these and the W stacks ITSELF. 💯
excellent: {move} is EXCELLENT. Not the top engine line — BETTER, it's YOURS.
EXCELLENT!! That's championship-level decision making. CHAMPIONSHIP. LEVEL.
{move} — excellent move!! The position stays YOURS. Landlord behavior.
Excellent!! You're not even breaking a sweat. CRUISE CONTROL at 100. 🔥
{move} is EXCELLENT. Keep this pace and they'll study this game in SCHOOLS.
EXCELLENT move. Solid. Powerful. ZERO doubt in the building.
{move}!! Excellent. The eval said 'no notes.' NO NOTES!!
good: {move} is GOOD. Respectable. Professional. The fundamentals are FUNDAMENTAL-ING.
Good move!! Not the flashiest — DOESN'T MATTER. Ws are built on these.
{move} — good. Keeping it steady. Steady is UNDERRATED. Like you. WERE. Past tense!!
GOOD move. The haters wanted a wobble. DENIED.
{move} is good!! Brick by brick!! That's how dynasties get BUILT.
Good!! There was a spicier option but consistency is ALSO a flex. 💯
{move}, good move. Quiet bar. Loud résumé. We keep moving.
book: {move} — STILL BOOK. You're walking the path of LEGENDS and you belong on it.
Book move!! Theory certified. The classics RESPECT you for this one.
{move} is straight theory. Studying the greats to BECOME one. CULTURE. 📚 wait no emoji for books. FIRE though. 🔥
Still in book!! You did the HOMEWORK. Prepared athletes are DANGEROUS athletes.
{move}, known theory. The GOATs played it first. You're playing it NEXT. Lineage!!
BOOK. The opening is on rails and the rails are PAID FOR.
{move} — theory says yes. The ancestors of this opening are NODDING.
inaccuracy: {move} is a LITTLE off. Tiny wobble. Even prime athletes miss free throws. MOVING ON.
Small inaccuracy!! That's not a stumble, that's a CROWD-WORK moment. Refocus!!
{move} — slightly inaccurate. The eval flinched. It did NOT fall. WE do not fall.
Minor slip!! The highlight reel doesn't even keep this part. NEXT.
{move} drifted a touch. Champions drift. Champions CORRECT. Correct!!
An inaccuracy. Barely. The comeback arc needed a LITTLE adversity anyway.
{move} was a half-step slow. HALF-step. You've got nine more gears. USE ONE.
mistake: {move} is a mistake. PAUSE. Breathe. Legends have BAD QUARTERS. They don't have bad CAREERS.
A MISTAKE?! Fine. FINE. This is the adversity montage. The music is building. LOCK IN.
{move} hurt us. Real talk. But pressure makes DIAMONDS and you're already carbon-based. SCIENCE!!
Mistake on the board. The doubters just sat up. Make them SIT BACK DOWN.
{move} — that's a mistake. Every GOAT has a game-five moment. THIS is yours. RESPOND.
A mistake!! You know what's undefeated? THE BOUNCE-BACK. Show me the bounce-back. 🔥
{move} was a mistake. Down but NOT out. The greatest comebacks start EXACTLY here.
miss: {move} MISSED ONE. There was a HIGHLIGHT in that position and it's still there crying. GO BACK FOR IT next time.
A miss!! The poster dunk was RIGHT THERE. You laid it in. STILL two points but COME ON. 🚨
{move} walked past GREATNESS. Greatness is patient. It'll knock again. ANSWER IT.
You missed the killshot!! The position offered you the MOMENT. Stay hungry for the MOMENT.
{move} — missed opportunity. The clip that COULD have been. Train the eyes. The eyes WIN games.
A MISS. Okay. The legend grows anyway, but scan for tactics EVERY move. Every. Move.
{move} skipped the highlight. Next time we take the SHOT. We are a TAKE-THE-SHOT program.
blunder: {move}... BLUNDER. WHO TURNED OFF THE LIGHTS. Okay. OKAY. Villain arc STARTS NOW. 🚨
A BLUNDER?! Nah. NAH. We're renaming it: PLOT TWIST. Heroes need a third act. GO GET YOURS.
{move} is a blunder and I am NOT going to lie to you, that one hurt my SOUL. New game plan: CHAOS. Embrace it.
BLUNDER ALERT. Deep breath. The GOAT lost playoff games, you'll survive a chess move. RESPOND LIKE A LEGEND.
{move}... that's a blunder, champ. Films have a dark second act ON PURPOSE. The crowd loves a comeback MORE.
A blunder!! Throw the tape AWAY. Goldfish memory. NEXT MOVE is the only move that exists.
{move} — BLUNDER. The arena went quiet. You know who plays best in quiet arenas? ROAD WARRIORS. That's you now.
BLUNDER. It's official: the universe wants a SHOW. Give it the redemption episode. RIGHT NOW. 🔥

weak_move_suffix: {best_move} was the PLAY though. Add it to the bag.
The engine said {best_move}. The engine is a HATER but the engine is RIGHT.
{best_move} was the highlight version. Study it. Steal it. It's LEGAL to steal it.
Next time: {best_move}. That's the clip we're chasing.
{best_move} was better. The bag gets DEEPER today.
move_fallback: {move}!! No label yet but the AURA is there.
{move} hits the board. We hype EVERYTHING until proven otherwise.
{move} is LIVE. Let's see what the nerds say. The nerds work for US.

starting_position: OPENING NIGHT!! Thirty-two pieces, ONE legend at the controls. LET'S GOOO 🔥
Starting position. The arena is full. The lights are ON. History gets written from square one.
Fresh board!! Undefeated in THIS game so far. Keep that energy ALL game.
Move zero. Champions visualize the W before move ONE. Visualize it. GOT IT? GO.
variation_exploration: SIDE QUEST!! We're exploring lines. Even the practice reps get MAX effort.
Off-script!! This is the lab. LEGENDS live in the lab. 🔬 okay no lab emoji. FIRE. 🔥
Variation mode. The main game is safe. This is where we TEST the crazy stuff.
Exploring the what-ifs!! The film room is OPEN. Cook something.
analyzing: The engine is COOKING. Give it a second. Greatness takes a moment to measure.
Analyzing!! Even the supercomputer needs time to process what you're doing out here.
Hold up — calculations in progress. The drama of WAITING. I love it. I HATE it. I love it.
Engine's thinking. It's nervous. I can TELL.
opening_known: THE {opening}!! ({eco}) — a CLASSIC. You're running plays from the GOAT playbook.
{opening} on the board!! {eco} certified. The legends built this road. STOMP down it.
It's the {opening}. Named. Famous. RESPECTED. And you're adding YOUR chapter today.
The {opening}, baby!! Theory with a JERSEY NUMBER. Wear it loud.
opening_unknown: NO NAME for this opening?! You're off the map. MAPS ARE FOR TOURISTS. 🔥
Unknown territory!! The books have NOTHING. First explorer energy. PLANT THE FLAG.
This opening is UNDOCUMENTED. You're not following history, you're FILING it.
No book, no name, NO PROBLEM. Raw talent hours. CLOCK IN.

eval_swing_large: THE EVAL JUST SWUNG {swing} POINTS!! EARTHQUAKE!! Somebody check the seismographs!! 🚨
{swing}-point swing!! The momentum just SLAMMED the door and took the keys.
WHOA. {swing} on the swing meter. This game has PLAYOFF energy now.
The needle jumped {swing}!! Someone in this game just went SUPERSONIC.
A {swing} SWING. The commentators are STANDING. I'm the commentators. I'M STANDING.
lead_change_white: WHITE TAKES THE LEAD!! The scoreboard FLIPPED. Crowd's on its feet!!
Lead change — WHITE'S in front!! Momentum shifts are MY CARDIO.
White grabs the wheel!! {eval} on the board. The race is ON. 🔥
WHITE SURGES AHEAD. Answer back or ride the wave — either way, GO LOUD.
The lead belongs to White now!! Rivalry game. INSTANT classic incoming.
lead_change_black: BLACK TAKES OVER!! Lead change!! This game has ZERO chill and I respect it.
Black's in FRONT now!! The script just flipped. SOMEBODY cue the drama music.
LEAD CHANGE — Black side!! The momentum did a full one-eighty. HOLD ON TIGHT.
Black grabs the lead!! Comeback SZN or collapse watch — we find out LIVE. 🚨
Advantage BLACK. The crowd is LOSING IT. I am the crowd.
lead_change_equal: ALL TIED UP!! Dead even!! The next big play takes the BELT. 💯
Back to EQUAL. Overtime energy. EVERYTHING matters from here.
The eval reset to even!! Two heavyweights, round twelve, NOBODY blinking.
LEVEL game again. Forget the past. WIN the next exchange. Then the NEXT one.
Even board!! This is anyone's trophy. Make it YOURS.
mate_on_board: MATE IN {mate_n} ON THE BOARD!! CLOSE THE SHOW!! Precision, then CONFETTI. 🚨
There's a forced mate in {mate_n}!! Championship point!! Don't celebrate EARLY — celebrate CORRECTLY.
MATE IN {mate_n}. The finish line is PAINTED. Sprint through it CLEAN.
Forced mate, {mate_n} moves!! This is the walk-off swing. DO NOT pull it foul.
missed_mate: THERE WAS A MATE IN {mate_n} AND IT GOT AWAY?! The game-winner stayed in the holster!! Okay. Reload. RE-AIM.
Missed mate in {mate_n}!! The buzzer-beater rimmed out. Champions get ANOTHER possession. TAKE IT.
A mate in {mate_n} slipped by. Painful. EDUCATIONAL. The next one does NOT escape.
You walked past mate in {mate_n}!! The trophy was RIGHT there. Stay greedy at the finish. GREEDY.
material_won_pawn: PAWN SECURED!! Small bag, REAL bag. Stack it. 💯
You're a pawn UP. Singles win ballgames too, superstar.
Pawn collected!! Compound interest is the strongest force in CHESS and FINANCE.
A whole pawn in the vault. Endgame-you is sending a THANK YOU card.
material_lost_pawn: Lost a pawn. ONE pawn. The empire does not fall over ONE pawn. REGROUP.
Pawn down!! Fine. Adversity discount. Activity is the REFUND. GO GET IT.
A pawn slipped away. Small L. Microscopic L. The W is still ON THE TABLE.
Down a pawn — SO WHAT. Legends play from behind ON PURPOSE. (They don't. But STILL.)
material_won_piece: A WHOLE {piece}?!! THAT'S A ROBBERY. THAT'S A HEIST. No mask, BROAD daylight!! 🔥
YOU WON A {piece}!! The trade deficit is REAL and it's in YOUR favor.
{piece} ACQUIRED. The roster upgrade of the CENTURY. Now CONVERT, champ.
An entire {piece} in the bag!! Lock in. Front-runners who FOCUS become CHAMPIONS.
material_lost_piece: We lost a {piece}. FULL timeout. Breathe. Heroes are built in EXACTLY this scene.
A {piece} DOWN. The mountain got steeper. GOOD. Better view from the top.
They took your {piece}!! Okay, underdog arc ACTIVATED. Crowds LOVE the underdog.
{piece} gone. Hurts. HURTS. But panic is for the OTHER side of the board. Make them earn EVERYTHING.
sacrifice: A SACRIFICE?!! YOU GAVE IT AWAY ON PURPOSE?! THE AUDACITY. THE SHOWMANSHIP. I'M IN. 🚨
MATERIAL SACRIFICED!! All gas, no brakes, full SEND. Now CASH IT IN.
THE SAC!! You bet on YOURSELF. That's the only bet legends ever make.
A sacrifice on the board!! The clock starts NOW. Speed and FURY, nothing else.
check: CHECK!! The king got CALLED OUT in front of EVERYONE.
CHECK on the board!! Pressure!! Kings hate pressure. APPLY MORE.
Check!! That's a jab. Set up the HAYMAKER.
CHECK. The king is moving with PURPOSE now. Scared purpose. 🔥
Check!! Forcing moves only. The tempo belongs to YOU.
checkmate: CHECKMAAAATE!!! BALLGAME!!! Somebody hang a BANNER!! 🐐
MATE ON THE BOARD. It's OVER. The handshake is a FORMALITY.
CHECKMATE!! The king fought the long arm of GREATNESS and LOST.
GAME. SET. MATE. Roll credits. Roll the HIGHLIGHTS. ALL of them.
stalemate: STALEMATE?!?! THE REFS CALLED IT A TIE?! I need a REVIEW. I need TEN reviews. 🚨
Stalemate. The cruelest half-point in SPORTS. Honor it. Learn it. NEVER repeat it.
A STALEMATE. The king pulled the fire alarm on his way out. Disrespectful. Effective.
Stalemate!! When you're winning big, every move needs SECURITY DETAIL. Lesson logged.
castle_short: CASTLED SHORT!! King in the bunker, rook ON DUTY. Two birds, ONE move. 💯
Short castle!! Defense WINS championships. Now go play OFFENSE.
King tucked, rook UNLEASHED. The most efficient move in the SPORT.
Castled!! Safety secured. Now we get DANGEROUS.
castle_long: CASTLED LONG?!! The SPICY castle!! Pawn storms incoming. RACE MODE. 🔥
Queenside castle!! Bold call from the franchise player. Opposite wings — SPRINT.
THE LONG CASTLE. High risk. High DRAMA. Highest ceiling in the building.
Castled long!! You chose VIOLENCE (chess violence) (legal) (ENCOURAGED).
promotion: PROMOTION!!! The pawn went from BENCH PLAYER to MVP. CINDERELLA STORY COMPLETE. 🐐
NEW QUEEN ON THE BOARD!! That pawn walked EIGHT ranks uphill. UNDRAFTED. UNSTOPPABLE.
The pawn PROMOTES!! From minimum contract to FRANCHISE PLAYER in one game.
PROMOTION!! Proof that grinders WIN. Hang that pawn's jersey in the RAFTERS.
en_passant: EN PASSANT?!! The RAREST move in the BOOK!! Connoisseur play!! The judges are STANDING. 🚨
EN PASSANT!! French for 'you thought you were SAFE.' Special-teams TOUCHDOWN.
An en passant capture!! Niche rule, MAXIMUM swagger. That's a collector's item.
leaving_theory: OUT OF BOOK!! The script is DONE. Improvisation hours. Stars SHINE here. 🔥
Theory OVER. No more training wheels. RAW GAME ONLY. Show the world.
We just left the book!! Every move from here is an ORIGINAL. Sign each one.
The book CLOSED. Now it's player vs player, mind vs mind. MY FAVORITE PART.
enter_middlegame: MIDDLEGAME TIME!! Openings are the warm-up. THIS is the main card. 💯
We're in the middlegame!! Plans, attacks, CHAOS. The fun zone. CLOCK IN.
Middlegame, baby!! Everyone's developed. NOW we find out who came to PLAY.
The middlegame begins!! Pick a plan and DRIVE it like it's stolen. (It's not stolen.) (DRIVE IT ANYWAY.)
enter_endgame: ENDGAME!! The fourth quarter!! Legends are MADE in the fourth quarter. 🔥
Endgame hours. Every pawn is PRECIOUS. Every tempo is GOLD. Crunch time DNA — activate.
We've hit the endgame!! Get the king OFF the bench. He plays in THIS quarter.
ENDGAME. Small margins, BIG consequences. Champions love the small margins.
queens_off: QUEENS OFF THE BOARD!! Both superstars EJECTED. Role players, IT'S YOUR TIME.
Queens traded!! The headliners left — now it's a GRINDER'S game. Grind LOUDER.
No more queens!! The game went from fireworks to CHESS chess. Lock in HARDER.
Queens are GONE. Less flash, more FUNDAMENTALS. Fundamentals are undefeated. 💯
turning_point: TURNING POINT!! The whole game just PIVOTED. Cameras ON. This is the moment they'll replay. 🚨
THE MOMENTUM JUST FLIPPED. Mark the timestamp. Documentaries START here.
Turning point on the board!! Old game DELETED. New game LOADING. Be first to it.
Everything changed RIGHT THERE. Win the next three moves and the story is YOURS.
streak_good: {n} STRAIGHT QUALITY MOVES!! HEAT CHECK!! You're ON FIRE!! 🔥
{n} in a ROW. The streak is ALIVE. Feed it. FEED THE STREAK.
That's {n} consecutive bangers!! The engine is just nodding at this point.
{n}-move streak!! UNCONSCIOUS. Don't look down. Don't look ANYWHERE. Just COOK.
{n} good ones BACK TO BACK. Dynasty behavior. DOCUMENT IT. 💯
streak_bad: {n} rough moves in a row. TIMEOUT. Towel. Water. Reset the JERSEY. We go again.
{n} straight slips. The slump is REAL but slumps are RENTALS. Eviction notice: NOW.
{n} in a row went sideways!! Every legend has a cold quarter. The HOT one is loading.
{n} shaky moves. STOP. One deep breath. One SAFE move. Then we re-enter BEAST MODE.
That's {n} misses. Goldfish memory, champ. The streak that MATTERS starts next move. 🚨
hanging_piece: YOUR {piece} IS HANGING!! UNGUARDED ASSET ON THE FLOOR!! SECURE THE BAG!! 🚨
The {piece} is FREE REAL ESTATE right now!! Defend it!! DEFEND IT!!
RED ALERT — {piece} undefended!! That's a franchise asset in the PARKING LOT. Go get it!!
Your {piece} is hanging out there ALONE. Loose pieces get TAKEN. That's the streets of chess.
UNPROTECTED {piece} ON THE BOARD. The other side SEES it. See it FIRST.
comeback: THE COMEBACK IS COMPLETE!!! THEY COUNTED YOU OUT AND YOU COUNTED THEM DOWN!! 🐐
BACK FROM THE DEAD!! This is the game they'll make the DOCUMENTARY about.
COMEBACK CERTIFIED!! Down bad, never OUT. Heart of a CHAMPION, confirmed live.
You CAME ALL THE WAY BACK!! The villain arc became a REDEMPTION arc. CINEMA. 🔥
endgame_opposite_bishops: Opposite-colored bishops!! Two fighters who can't TOUCH each other. Weirdest matchup in the sport — usually a draw, UNLESS you bring the attack.
Opposite bishops on the board. Extra pawns matter LESS, ATTACKERS matter MORE. Choose your color. DOMINATE it.
The opposite-bishop ending!! Drawish on paper. PAPER never played with HEART. Build on your color and PUSH.
endgame_rook: ROOK ENDGAME!! The classic grind. Active rook WINS. Passive rook WATCHES. BE ACTIVE. 💯
Rook ending on the board!! Rooks behind passed pawns — that's the OLDEST play in the playbook and it STILL scores.
Down to rooks!! 'All rook endings are drawn' — said people who LOST them. GRIND IT.
Rook endgame hours. King activity. Rook activity. EVERYTHING activity. Sleep when it's over.

clean_win: CLEAN SWEEP!!! Wire to wire, NO doubt, NO mercy. FRAME THIS GAME. 🐐
FLAWLESS VICTORY!! Start to finish domination. The other side never even got HOPE.
A clean W!! Every phase, CONTROLLED. That's not luck, that's a TAKEOVER.
WIRE. TO. WIRE. Put it in the trophy case and build a BIGGER trophy case. 🔥
slipped_win: You had the W and it slipped... I'm not gonna sugarcoat it: that one STUNG. But scars are TATTOOS with better stories. NEXT GAME.
The win got AWAY. Heartbreaker. You know what legends do with heartbreak? FUEL. Premium-grade FUEL. 🚨
Up big, lost late. The hardest L in the sport. Study the collapse ONCE, then burn the tape and come back MEANER.
It slipped!! Listen: you BUILT a winning position. The building skills are REAL. The closing skills? IN TRAINING. We train.
hard_fought_draw: A DRAW after a WAR. Half a point, FULL respect. That was a heavyweight bout. 💯
Hard-fought tie!! Nobody backed down. The rematch is going to be LEGENDARY.
A fighting draw!! Both sides emptied the tank. The tank is what we CAME to see.
Split decision!! No loser in that one — just two warriors and ONE very tired scoreboard.
loss: An L today. Real ones know: the legend REQUIRES a chapter like this. Chapter's OVER. Turn the page. 🔥
You lost the game. The game did NOT lose you. Tape, lessons, REVENGE TOUR. In that order.
A loss. Hurts NOW, fuels FOREVER. Every GOAT has a rival that beat them first. FIRST.
L on the record. Records are paper. HUNGER is forever. Eat the lesson, champ, and RELOAD.

Loading the tape!! Mistakes are just unclaimed HIGHLIGHTS. Go claim one.

{move}, marked {label}. Time for the director's cut. YOUR cut.
